log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Elf — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Elf — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Elf — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 20] FAIL! 35 necrotic damage. HP: 32/67
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.

→ Elf — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 23 fire damage + .
